name: Crockpot Mediterranean Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or green bell pepper - seeded and chopped
2 cans Garbanzo beans (14 oz.) - drained and rinsed
1 Can Artichoke hearts packed in water (14 oz.) - drained and quartered
Crushed red pepper flakes to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except for noodles to the crockpot.
2. Stir well.
3. Optionally, add 1 tablespoon tomato paste for a thicker stew.
4. Cook on low for 8 hours.
5. Serve over cooked egg noodles.
(Note: Serves 6. 251 calories per serving. 2 g fat. 7% from fat)
